title: Consistent Dropdown field across boards

posts.author: RyanUR (Ryan Priestman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have a lot of client boards and we use the Dropdown field to determine the type of task that is being worked on (ie Calls/Meetings, Emails, and more specific task types)

We want this Dropdown field to be consistent across all client boards without having to update each one. Ideally we’d manage the values in a central board and just update that (which would automatically update the others).

Does anyone know how to do this or if it’s even possible?
